name: analytics-observability
scope: Three-phase analytics framework upgrade: (1.A) hygiene + (1.B) gates, (2) live event debugger (local mirror + GA4 Realtime MCP poll), (3) dashboards (control-room/analytics route + Looker Studio template). Closes 56-row CSV drift + 4 unfired events + 21 untested + disconnected GA4 MCP. Approach B (phased single feature) per 2026-05-13 brainstorm.
launch_window: Phase 1.A + Phase 2: 2026-05-15 → 22 (between v7.8.5.1 ship and v7.9 Phase E start). Phase 3: 2026-05-21 → 06-04 (parallel with v7.9 Phase E monitoring). Phase 1.B gates: 2026-06-04 → 06-26 via 22d Calibration Protocol (advisory 06-04 → 06-11; calibration 06-11 → 06-18; promotion decision 06-18; Phase E exit 06-25).

blocker_resolutions.sequencing: Revised 3-window plan (1.A + 2 next week, 3 during Phase E, 1.B post Phase E)
blocker_resolutions.csv_ownership: Single canonical CSV in FT2; D-1 reverse-sync extends to fitme-story build read
blocker_resolutions.live_debugger_flavor: Both local mirror (websocket + /analytics watch CLI) and GA4 Realtime MCP poll
blocker_resolutions.dashboard_surface: Both /control-room/analytics route and Looker Studio template
blocker_resolutions.infra_plan_fold_in: Approach A — sub-doc of infra master plan; Phase 1.B becomes F19/F20 in v8.0 docket

sources: Cross-reference iOS enum (114 events) vs analytics-taxonomy.csv (58 rows)
fitme-story web analytics survey (12/14 events wired)
GA4 MCP adapter status (defined, not connected)

metrics.kill_criteria: If Phase 1.B gates (CSV_TAXONOMY_DRIFT + GA4_MCP_DISCONNECTED) produce >5% false positive rate in 7-day Phase C calibration window, defer gate enforcement to v7.10 and ship hygiene-only outcome.

transitions.note: Approach B (phased single feature) + revised 3-window sequencing + single canonical CSV + both debugger surfaces + both dashboard surfaces + Approach A infra-plan fold-in. 4 decisions locked.

tasks.title: CSV taxonomy backfill (49 events + 7 screens + 1 user prop)
tasks.outcome: 0 missing events (was 49). 0 missing screens (was 7). 0 missing user properties (was 1). All 114 enum events in CSV via flat-scan.

tasks.title: Resolve declared-but-unfired ai_recommendation_* events
tasks.outcome: DELETED both events (aiRecommendationAccepted + aiRecommendationDismissed) — they were duplicates of home_ai_feedback_submitted which already carries rating: positive/negative. Removed enum constants, removed CSV rows, updated funnel-definitions.md + master plan §5.1 task entry. Enum 114 → 112; CSV stays aligned 112/112.
